raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, an unauthorized charge of approximately {$15.00} was made on my credit card. On XX/XX/XXXX, a much larger unauthorized charge of about {$1400.00} occurred. I have not used this card in a few years, and it has remained in my possession the entire time. I was unaware of these fraudulent transactions until XX/XX/XXXX, when I unexpectedly noticed them on my account. 

I immediately contacted my bank to report the charges and filed a dispute. I also explained that I have never lost or shared my card, and I do not understand how these unauthorized charges were made. 

Despite this, I recently received a letter from the bank stating that their investigation concluded I am responsible for the charges. I am confused and frustrated by this decision and am now seeking assistance to understand how this could have happened and to help resolve the matter.
